title: April User Group - The Age of AI Abundance: Stop Rationing your Tokens
abstract:
NET User Group April: The Age of Abundance: Stop Rationing your Tokens with Eddie Kranz

Embrace the token abundance mindset. Models are getting faster, and context windows are expanding; the biggest bottleneck in software engineering is our own scarcity mindset.

Join Eddie as he breaks down how to completely rethink your relationship with AI tools.

We will explore why we're ditching agent frameworks for pre-built Claude Code backends, and how token abundance has led us to automate entire sprint review loops and revisit seemingly solved problems. Stop hoarding tokens and rethink everything from first principles, because the game has officially changed.

Agenda (Sydney time)

6 pm – Pizza and networking! 🍕
6:30 pm – Welcome & News with Eve & Adam Cogan - this will be live-streamed around the world
6:45 pm – The Age of Abundance: Stop Rationing Your Tokens with Eddie Kranz
Can't make it? Jump on the live stream:
https://www.ssw.com.au/live
